2604.27763.title: Intent2Tx: Benchmarking LLMs for Translating Natural Language Intents into Ethereum Transactions
2604.27763.paper_summary: The emergence of Large Language Models (LLMs) offers a transformative interface for Web3, yet existing benchmarks fail to capture the complexity of translating high-level user intents into functionally correct, state-dependent on-chain transactions. We present \textsc{Intent2Tx}, a high-fidelity benchmark featuring 29,921 single-step and 1,575 multi-step instances meticulously derived from 300 days of real-world Ethereum mainnet traces. Unlike prior works that rely on synthetic instructions, \textsc{Intent2Tx} grounds natural language intents in real-world protocol interactions across 11 categories, including diverse long-tail Decentralized Finance (DeFi) primitives. To enable rigorous evaluation, we propose an execution-aware framework that transcends surface-level text matching by employing differential state analysis on forked mainnet environments. Our extensive evaluation of 16 state-of-the-art LLMs reveals that while scaling and retrieval-augmentation enhance logical consistency and parameter precision, current models struggle with out-of-distribution generalization and multi-step planning. Crucially, our execution-based analysis demonstrates that syntactically valid outputs often fail to achieve intended state transitions, highlighting a significant gap in current "reasoning-to-execution" capabilities. \textsc{Intent2Tx} serves as a critical foundation for developing autonomous, reliable agents in intent-centric Web3 ecosystems. Code and data: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Intent2Tx_Bench-97FF .
2604.27763.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）的出現為Web3提供了一個變革性的介面，但現有的基準無法捕捉將高層次用戶意圖轉化為功能正確、依賴狀態的鏈上交易的複雜性。<lb/>我們提出了\textsc{Intent2Tx}，這是一個高保真基準，包含29,921個單步和1,575個多步實例，這些實例是從300天的真實以太坊主網追蹤中精心推導而來。<lb/>與依賴合成指令的先前工作不同，\textsc{Intent2Tx}將自然語言意圖根植於11個類別的真實協議互動中，包括多樣的長尾去中心化金融（DeFi）原語。<lb/>為了實現嚴格的評估，我們提出了一個執行感知框架，通過在分叉的主網環境中進行差異狀態分析，超越了表面文本匹配。<lb/>我們對16個最先進的LLMs的廣泛評估顯示，儘管擴展和檢索增強提高了邏輯一致性和參數精度，但當前模型在分佈外泛化和多步規劃上仍然面臨挑戰。<lb/>關鍵的是，我們的基於執行的分析表明，語法上有效的輸出往往無法實現預期的狀態轉換，突顯了當前“推理到執行”能力的重大缺口。<lb/>\textsc{Intent2Tx}作為在以意圖為中心的Web3生態系統中開發自主、可靠代理的關鍵基礎。<lb/>代碼和數據：https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Intent2Tx_Bench-97FF。
2604.27763.author: Zhuoran Pan et.al.
2604.27763.authors: Zhuoran Pan, Yue Li, Zhi Guan, Jianbin Hu, Zhong Chen
